items.title: WeaveBench: A Long-Horizon, Real-World Benchmark for Computer-Use Agents with Hybrid Interfaces
items.summary: Researchers introduce WeaveBench, a new benchmark designed to evaluate computer-use agents on complex, long-horizon tasks in real-world environments using hybrid interfaces.

items.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
items.summary: Meta is reportedly unwinding its $2 billion acquisition of AI startup Manus following demands from Beijing, highlighting increasing geopolitical tensions in tech mergers.

items.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
items.summary: KPMG has withdrawn a recent report on AI usage after discovering that the AI models used to generate parts of the report produced significant hallucinations, raising concerns about AI reliability in professional services.

items.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
items.summary: Amazon's CEO reportedly expressed concerns about Anthropic's AI models prior to a government crackdown, suggesting internal awareness of potential issues before public intervention.

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.summary: OpenAI reports that influence operations linked to the People's Republic of China are actively targeting AI-related discussions and debates within the United States.

items.title: HYDRA-X: Native Unified Multimodal Models with Holistic Visual Tokenizers
items.summary: A new research paper introduces HYDRA-X, a framework for native unified multimodal models that utilize holistic visual tokenizers to enhance understanding across different data types.

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: OpenAI announces that its models, including Codex, are now accessible to customers through their existing Oracle cloud commitments, expanding enterprise integration options.

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply is leveraging a combination of AI and human tutors to create personalized learning experiences, demonstrating a hybrid approach to educational technology.

items.title: N-GRPO: Embedding-Level Neighbor Mixing for Enhanced Policy Optimization
items.summary: Researchers propose N-GRPO, a novel method that uses embedding-level neighbor mixing to significantly enhance policy optimization in reinforcement learning.

items.title: Demystifying Hidden-State Recurrence: Switchable Latent Reasoning with On-Policy Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: This paper explores hidden-state recurrence, introducing switchable latent reasoning combined with on-policy reinforcement learning to improve understanding and control of agent behavior.

items.title: VideoMDM: Towards 3D Human Motion Generation From 2D Supervision
items.summary: VideoMDM presents a new approach for generating realistic 3D human motion directly from 2D video supervision, simplifying the process of creating complex animations.

items.title: DyCo-RL: Dynamic Cross-Modal Coordination for Visual Reasoning
items.summary: DyCo-RL introduces a dynamic cross-modal coordination framework for visual reasoning, enabling AI systems to better integrate information from different sensory modalities.

items.title: VIA-SD: Verification via Intra-Model Routing for Speculative Decoding
items.summary: VIA-SD proposes a novel method for speculative decoding that uses intra-model routing for verification, potentially improving the efficiency and accuracy of language model outputs.

items.title: The Most Powerful Model on the Market Got Pulled by the Government in 3 Days. Is It Real, or a Hype Bubble?
items.summary: An article discusses the rapid government intervention to pull a supposedly powerful new AI model from the market, questioning whether it signifies genuine risk or an overhyped bubble.

items.title: Why Testing MCP Servers With Real AI Models Matters (2026)
items.summary: This article emphasizes the critical importance of testing MCP (Multi-Cloud Platform) servers using actual AI models to ensure robust performance and reliability in real-world scenarios.
